hooks.command: node -e "const d=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('/dev/stdin','utf8'));const p=d.tool_input&&(d.tool_input.file_path||'');if(/apps[\\/]admin[\\/]src[\\/]app[\\/]\(app\)[\\/]\(libraries\)|apps[\\/]admin[\\/]messages/.test(p)){process.stderr.write('REMINDER: You edited a file under apps/admin/(libraries) or apps/admin/messages. Run hedhog dev assets-to-library <library> before finishing.\n');}"
